version: UST 1.0 conformance vectors (rc.36 - external-audit remediation: 5 P0 fixed structurally (epic UST-1o6); prior rc.33: #75 ROOT 3 (math-derived, NO manifest): forkChoice/verifyStream resolve per-frame AUTHORITY (impersonation P0-03) + grid EQUALITY (off-grid P0-04); stream-authority/stream-grid/fork-choice vectors; prior: - #75 ROOT 1 two-phase verify + anchor-time (authority-at-time vectors: retired/compromised/premature K_n(t) window judged against the PROVEN anchor); prior: - #75 ROOT 2 key-log temporal state machine (keylog-state vectors: revoked/rotated-out/retired key cannot sign later; closed key_op schema); prior: - #75 strict encoders P1-01/02/03 (utf8-reject, b64url, cadence); prior: — self-audit fix: freshness:attested now requires a VERIFIED keylogHeadAnchor (inclusion + substrate-final), a raw self-computed head hash proves nothing = overclaim closed. Prior: #41 canon arbiter, #40 identity hardening, #44 agent-safety, #45 downgrade + fork-choice)
note: Deterministic + reproducible. Keypairs from fixed seeds (A=0011..eeff, B=ffee..1100). canon=JCS tightened; H(tag,x)=sha256(ascii(tag)||0x00||x); content_hash=H("ust:state",canon({ust,state})); key_id=H("ust:keylog",raw_pub); partition_hash=H("ust:shard",canon({domain_shard,ust_id,partition,value})) — UNIFORM, every partition binds domain_shard, name is a VALUE (non-colliding), no domain-less computed. Each vector states the SPEC rule it pins. Signature-type vectors use expect: 'VALID' | 'E-SIG' for the Ed25519 PRIMITIVE check (strict, canonical-S); this is not a document verdict — a conforming verifier's document verdict is always tier-qualified (VALID:LIGHT/HIGH/TOP), never a bare VALID. Partition names inside hash/commit inputs (e.g. 'secret') are arbitrary sample names, not protocol features.

vectors.rule: S6 keys sorted, no whitespace, strings-only
S6 array order is significant
S6 keys lexicographically sorted
S6 sort recurses into nested objects
S6 array order significant; sibling object keys sorted
S6 objects inside arrays are key-sorted; array position kept
S6 minimal JSON escaping: quote and backslash only
S6 C0 control chars escaped (\n, \t), not raw
S6 non-ASCII kept as UTF-8 bytes, NOT \u-escaped (the cross-language trap)
S6 astral (surrogate-pair) code points kept as UTF-8, not \u-escaped
S6 canonical empty object and empty array
S5 no number leaf
S5 no boolean leaf
S5 no null leaf
S6 NFC required
S6 unique member names
vectors.input_desc: object with a duplicate member name

vectors.rule: S6 pinned RFC3339 UTC-Z, no fractional
S6 pinned literal Z, no numeric offset
S4.4 partition hash binds domain_shard; name is a VALUE (non-colliding)
S4.4 other domain -> DIFFERENT hash (no domain-less collapse)
S7 domain separation
S7 same input, tag ust:state -> DIFFERENT
S12.2 key_id = H("ust:keylog", base64url-decode(pub))
vectors.note: NOT plain SHA256(pub); domain-separated over the raw 32 bytes

vectors.rule: S10 blinded commit = H_shard(canon({domain_shard,ust_id,nonce,partition,value}))
G23 same value+nonce in another frame -> DIFFERENT commit (no replay)
S9.4 seed = H_seed(canon([h1,h2,h3])) in pinned order
S9.2 root over content_hashes, byte-ascending sorted, ust:leaf/ust:node
vectors.note: input given unsorted; builder MUST sort byte-ascending first

vectors.rule: S19 unknown MAJOR -> E-MALFORMED
S19 1.x with x>y -> E-MALFORMED
G19 partition without a hashes entry -> E-MALFORMED
G19 hashes entry without a partition -> E-MALFORMED
S7 Ed25519 over canon({ust,state})
any state change breaks the sig
S14.4 key_id MUST == H("ust:keylog",pub)
vectors.note: key_id does not equal H(ust:keylog,pub) -> reject

vectors.rule: S7/N6 strict Ed25519: reject non-canonical S (S>=L)
vectors.note: S+L non-canonical; a STRICT verifier MUST reject. node/OpenSSL strict? true

vectors.rule: #75 P1-01 raw bytes MUST be valid UTF-8 (no U+FFFD replacement)
#75 P1-01 lone surrogate ED A0 80 is invalid UTF-8
#75 P1-01 truncated multibyte sequence is invalid UTF-8
#75 P1-02 canonical unpadded base64url of 32 bytes
#75 P1-02 canonical unpadded base64url of 64 bytes
#75 P1-02 padding '=' is not unpadded base64url
#75 P1-02 decodes to 31 != 32 bytes
#75 P1-02 '!' is outside the base64url alphabet
#75 P1-02 standard base64 (+/, padded) is not base64url
#75 P1-03 canonical positive integer seconds
#75 P1-03 fractional cadence rejected
#75 P1-03 leading zero not canonical
#75 P1-03 exponent form rejected
#75 P1-03 zero cadence rejected
#75 P1-03 cadence over the 366d bound rejected
#75 P0-02a revoked key cannot sign a later entry
#75 P0-02b rotate supersedes the SIGNER; it cannot sign later
#75 P0-02e unknown op is E-KEY, not a no-op
#75 P0-02d revoke MUST carry reason
#75 retired MUST NOT carry compromised_since
#75 P1-07 closed schema: stray field in add
#75 revoke of a never-authorized key is E-KEY
#75 valid add: genesis + K1 both active
#75 revoke shrinks active but keeps binding
#75 P0-01 retired key + U after retirement → expired
#75 compromised + U ≥ C → E-KEY
round-16 P1-01: U after the revoke transition R (R<U<C) → expired; C taints earlier sigs but never lengthens K_n past R (F.5e)
#75 active key, U after auth → authoritative
#75 P0-03b G-signed on-grid stream → complete
#75 P0-03b X-signed frames under victim genesis → E-AUTHORITY
#75 P0-04 off-grid frame → E-PREV (grid equality)
#75 P0-03a X-signed anchored doc under victim → NOT canonical (INDETERMINATE)
